## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Any API/real-world path touched has an integration or harness validation path

## Test Integrity

- [ ] No skipped tests introduced (`describe.skip`, `it.skip`, `test.skip`)
- [ ] If any test must be skipped temporarily, PR includes reason, owner, and follow-up issue link

## Risk & Rollback

- [ ] Risk level documented (low/medium/high)
- [ ] Rollback approach documented
